deploy.startCommand: NODE_ENV=production OTTE_SQLITE_PATH=/app/storage/opentabletop.sqlite OTTE_UPLOAD_DIR=/app/storage/uploads OTTE_PLUGIN_DIR=/app/storage/plugins OTTE_BUNDLED_PLUGIN_DIR=/app/plugins OTTE_DEMO_SEED=false OTTE_SQLITE_BACKUP_RUN_ON_START=true OTTE_SQLITE_BACKUP_INTERVAL_SECONDS=86400 OTTE_SQLITE_BACKUP_REASON=railway-nightly OTTE_SQLITE_BACKUP_RETENTION_COUNT=30 OTTE_CODEX_APP_SERVER_COMMAND=apps/api/node_modules/.bin/codex OTTE_CODEX_APP_SERVER_LOGIN_TYPE=chatgptDeviceCode node apps/api/dist/server.js
